# Extracao: Module 2

- **Fonte:** Module 2.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿MODULE 2 LAUNCH PLAN

This module covers setting yourself up for success by creating a strong plan and a clear roadmap to follow for your first launch. By the end of this module, you’ll know how to identify your niche, avatar, assets and goals, plus how to build and warm your list.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]
Introduction to Module 2: Your Launch Plan. This lesson will help you lay the groundwork for a great launch.

2 Niche Selection [42 minutes]
In order to launch effectively, you'll want to identify your niche. A niche is that little slice of a bigger market that you can potentially own. In general, the smaller and more well-defined your niche is, the stronger your positioning.

3 Customer Avatar [25 minutes]
In this lesson you'll identify your avatar, which is like creating a character or persona that represents your ideal client. You may even have more than one avatar, but key is to get really clear on who you want to talk to so your marketing will be more effective.

4 Building Your List [13 minutes]
Your email list is your most valuable asset. No matter your product, your niche, or your business model, you always want to focus on building your list and strengthening your relationship with your list. That's what this lesson is all about.

5 Warming Your Cold List [5 minutes]
A cold list is a list that, for whatever reason, you're no longer communicating regularly with. This lesson covers the importance of re-establishing a connection with your list, and how to do it well. A healthy relationship with your list will be critical as you head into your launch.

6 Asset Identification [20 minutes]
It may seem like you're starting from scratch, but the truth is you're probably a lot further along than you think. You've got a ton of assets around you that may not be obvious at first glance, and this lesson is all about finding them and using them as you plan your launch.

7 Your Goals [10 minutes]
As you prepare for your launch, it's very important to be clear on what you're trying to accomplish. This lesson is about defining a path and visualizing what you want your business and your life to be like, so you can make choices that align with your goals as you grow your business.

8 Your Launch Goals [9 minutes]
The saying goes, "If you don't know where you're going, any path will take you there.” You can’t create a great launch strategy until you figure out what you want to achieve first, so this is all about defining realistic launch goals.

9 Your Launch Success Path [20 minutes]
This lesson will show you how to launch, step by step. You can start quickly with the Seed Launch or the Internal Launch... and which one is the right one for you comes down to one easily answered question.
